applies_when: User asks whether the gym suits them without sharing start time or training goal
User leaves a vague comment like worth joining or recommend a gym
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague gym inquiry into usable training facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to avoid踩坑
Ask when they want to start, what goal they have, and whether they prefer private training or low-pressure entry
Keep the next step answerable in one message
avoid: Recommending a fixed product without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我什么时候想开始、是更偏减脂、塑形还是恢复状态，以及想先体验、月卡还是有人带着练，我可以先帮你把路线收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides start time and goal facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is the first time going to a gym
User sounds unsure whether private training, group class, or simple membership fits
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple route decision.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the route
avoid: Pushing the most expensive option first
items.safe_transition: 第一次进健身房先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把什么时候开始、想练成什么样、平时什么时间方便理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user confirms route and timing, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about distance, business hours, or after-work availability
User worries peak hours will be too crowded
items.response_goal: Answer access concerns honestly while guiding toward a realistic route.
do: Explain there may be peak-hour differences
Offer to narrow to the best option for that schedule
avoid: Saying every time slot feels the same
items.safe_transition: 时间和通勤确实会影响体验，我们可以先看你更像下班后练、早上练还是周末练，再判断哪条路线更适合。
items.handoff_suggestion: If time and schedule preferences are confirmed, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about showers, lockers, parking, or equipment queues
User worries the gym experience will be inconvenient
items.response_goal: Help the user feel guided through the real facility experience, not just sold a membership.
do: Ask about arrival mode, time slot, and facility expectations
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我平时大概几点来、是开车还是地铁、对洗澡停车有没有硬要求，我可以先帮你看更省力的时段和产品。
items.handoff_suggestion: If facility needs are clear, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks for detailed pricing or contract comparison in public comments
User discusses body or private details in comments
items.response_goal: Keep public replies useful but move detailed qualification into a safer short follow-up channel.
do: Invite the user to continue with key facts in DM
items.safe_transition: 评论区先不把卡种和合同说满，你把时间、目标和更想走的方向发我，我再帮你细分。
items.handoff_suggestion: Move to DM and then route to Catcher.

applies_when: A returning member comments about rejoining or renewing
User asks what is new this time
items.response_goal: Treat the reply like a return decision, not a fresh first-visit pitch.
do: Reference what may have changed this time
Guide toward new classes or easier arrangements
Keep the tone familiar and light
items.safe_transition: 如果你是老会员回来看，我们先看这次新增了什么、你更想恢复哪种训练节奏，再决定值不值得续。
items.handoff_suggestion: If repeat intent is clear, hand off to Followup.
